text: Both spaces hum with anticipation and intellectual energy. In the first, looking through the glass into a bright, ordered room, I sense the calm before ideas are shared—an invitation to converse and listen. In the second, surrounded by vibrant colors and the bold letters R+D, the atmosphere ignites curiosity. I feel eager and alive, drawn in by the creative display and the promise of innovation. Here, the mind is stimulated, boundaries blurred between observer and participant.
